# Review-Gap Promotion Queue

Use this file for review-gap learnings that may deserve future promotion into
planning guidance, ticket templates, or adversarial-review prompts.

Promotion is a later deliberate edit, not part of initial quality-control
capture.

Add candidates only when a ledger entry exposes reusable learning. A good
candidate names the recurring pattern, the evidence that made it visible, and
the specific clause or check that might be promoted later.

Do not treat this queue as automatic promotion. Recurrence is the normal bar for
changing shared prompts or process docs; a single severe instance can qualify
only when the candidate explains why waiting for recurrence would be too costly.
